problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene
hypothesis: If Viral vector delivery of therapeutic gene is applied to spread, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 28 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
